title: MEXC adds Bittensor TAO staking for its global user base
summary: The integration with validator Yuma gives millions of MEXC users access to Bittensor, an AI-focused blockchain whose ecosystem now spans 128 specialized subnets.

title: Bitcoin nears seven-week high as stocks ignore Iran strikes, Trump 10% tariff plans
summary: Bitcoin and crypto joined US stocks in brushing off US-Iran war escalation and the threat of fresh trade tariffs before the end of the month.

title: Stocks Climb as Rebound in Chipmakers Gathers Pace: Markets Wrap
summary: Wall Street staged a comeback as dip buyers emerged, lifting stocks amid rally in chipmakers on bets the artificial-intelligence trade that’s powered the bull market has more room to run.

title: High-Yielding Emerging-Market Currencies Gain, Stocks Rebound
summary: Most emerging-market currencies advanced on Tuesday, bolstered by a rebound in risk appetite as investors looked past the latest developments in the Middle East and focused on carry trades instead.

title: Jack Mallers Quits Twenty One Capital as Tether's Bitcoin Merger Collapses
summary: XXI stock dropped nearly 18% after the company's co-founder stepped down and Tether's plan to combine three Bitcoin firms officially fell apart.

title: Galaxy Commits Up to $5 Million to Prepare Bitcoin for Quantum Threat
summary: The crypto firm's initiative arrives as researchers, exchanges, and the U.S. government warn that "Q-Day" may land as soon as 2030.

title: Bitget plans US expansion ‘with or without’ Clarity Act, CEO says
summary: Bitget CEO Gracy Chen is leading the crypto exchange's push into the U.S. after initially shelving expansion plans in 2022.

title: Uphold launches fractional share trading in US for more than 4,000 stocks and ETFs
summary: “Uphold customers can now sell Bitcoin to buy Berkshire Hathaway shares in a single step on the app," the company's U.S. president said.

title: Trump prepares fresh tariff barrage with 10% levies set to expire

title: US to hit Canada with 50% tariffs on wide range of goods
